answer_en:
Rectus Abdominis m. (Not visible on left side)
Flexion of the trunk at the thoracic and lumbar spine
Tenses the anterior wall and assists in compressing the contents of the abdomen (increases intra-abdominal pressure)

details: Flexion of the trunk at the thoracic and lumbar spine
Tenses the anterior wall and assists in compressing the contents of the abdomen (increases intra-abdominal pressure)

title: Anterior View of Abdominal Wall
subtitle: (Anterior Rectus Sheath Removed on Right Side)
